settings.title: Settings
settings.prefsDesc: Customize your game experience. Settings are saved locally.
settings.colorBlindMode: Color blind friendly mode (orange/blue with labels)
settings.teamsDesc: Customize team names for this game. Names are encoded in the shareable link.
settings.wordsDesc: Choose which words appear on the board. Custom words are encoded in the shareable link.
settings.storageFailed: Settings applied but could not be saved. They will be lost on reload.

roomSettings.gameModeHint: Choose how you want to play.

wordList.lowVariety: {{count}} words (works, but more variety is better)

rules.intro: Two teams race to find all their words. Spymasters give clues, Clickers reveal cards.
rules.step1: Spymaster gives a one-word clue + number
rules.step2: Clickers reveal cards matching the clue
rules.step3: Your color = keep going, Neutral/Enemy = turn ends
rules.note: Starting team finds 9 words, other team finds 8. First to find all wins!
rules.matchIntro: A multi-round match where every card has a hidden point value. Teams play rounds until one reaches 42 points.
rules.matchStep1: Each round plays like a Vintage game
rules.matchStep2: When you reveal a card, your team earns its point value
rules.matchNote: Only spymasters can see card scores before they are revealed. The assassin still ends the round instantly!

about.description: A free, open-source implementation of the popular board game.

toast.failedToCopy: Failed to copy - please copy manually

history.multiplayerOnly: Game history is only available in multiplayer mode
history.clearConfirm: Clear all game history for this room? This cannot be undone.
history.hostOnly: Only the host can clear game history

forfeit.multiplayerOnly: Forfeit is only available in multiplayer mode
forfeit.hostOnly: Only the host can forfeit the game

modals.newGameBody: This will end the current game. Are you sure?
modals.endTurnBody: Are you sure you want to end your team's turn?
modals.forfeitBody: This will end the game and award the win to the opposing team. Are you sure?
modals.kickBody: Are you sure you want to remove this player from the room?
modals.rotateRolesBody: For the next game, choose different players to be spymasters and clickers so everyone gets a turn!
modals.errorDefault: An error occurred while loading the game.
modals.errorHint: Please try refreshing the page. If the problem persists, clear your browser cache.
modals.historySubtitle: View past games in this room
